title: Gundam must be stopped
wikitext:
[]: Gundam must be stopped             Quote Post by Kyle » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:07 pm Ok i was skiming through a magazine the other day (newtype usa if you must know) and came across a most popular anime list.The catgories were...top 20 anime,top 10 anime male,top 10 anime female. In anime NGE placed 3rd while "gundam seed destiny" took first and "black cat" in last place. Next came the top 10 fav male charactors.Shinji ikari came in last...yep...while kira yamato from "gundam seed destiny" was first. Last but not least is the ladies.Rei Ayanami came in 5th while Asuka langly shoryu was luckey # 7(and she thinks shes #1)Lacus clyne again from "gundam seed destiny" was first and sakura from "tsubasa chronicle" was last. Well not to sound like a heritic but gundam is kicking ass.I like gundam but my heart lays with EVA.If you must flame please do so by PM. I posted this because i thought it was a a good read.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:11 pm Im with you on this.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:12 pm The thing you must realize is that Gundam Seed is popular and fresh right now. Evangelion is a 10 year old anime that does consistently well in popularity polls. I guarantee you will not see Gundam Seed anything on these polls in 5 years time, but Evangelion will still be on the list. Many shows burn out in popularity after a few years. Polls like this simply illustrate how great Evangelion does after all these years.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:26 pm I downloaded all of seed and cant bring myself to watch it. Does this mean their hope for me or that im just lazy?

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:29 pm Meh, I personally dont recognize a magazine as having the final say over what series is better than another. If some magazine says that a series is better than another, they are just stating their opinion. You have your own opinion too, and if you think Eva is better than Gundam, then so be it. It's no big deal at all, really. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:39 pm It's not even the magazine. It's the magazine's readers .

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 21, 2006 9:05 pm DatDude wrote: I downloaded all of seed and cant bring myself to watch it. Does this mean their hope for me or that im just lazy?

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Feb 21, 2006 9:23 pm :[ Then tell Anime Insider to stop cracking the emo Shinji jokes. I even wrote them a letter. Seriously. i did.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Tue Feb 21, 2006 9:59 pm What the hell? Lucy is obviously the best female.

[]:             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:29 am Man, I loved Gundam, but then again I'm a sucker for space opera. Gundam combines said love of space opera with my love of mecha. That being said, I loved Gundam Seed, but only liked Seed Destiny. It was pretty much the exact same story as Seed, only with a much less likable protagonist, and a confusing shift in the romantic subplots.

[]:             Quote Post by phanthompain » Sat Jul 01, 2006 2:42 am Archon Divinus wrote: Man, I loved Gundam, but then again I'm a sucker for space opera. Gundam combines said love of space opera with my love of mecha. That being said, I loved Gundam Seed, but only liked Seed Destiny. It was pretty much the exact same story as Seed, only with a much less likable protagonist, and a confusing shift in the romantic subplots.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 6:26 am No offence, but Gundam Seed is a good show. Maybe not as good as Eva but still good

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sat Jul 01, 2006 11:06 am i'm preparing a flash where a gundam faces eva-01 (crappy animation but it works) :P

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 8:28 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: i'm preparing a flash where a gundam faces eva-01 (crappy animation but it works) :P

[]:             Quote Post by SSGokuJr » Sat Jul 01, 2006 10:14 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: i'm preparing a flash where a gundam faces eva-01 (crappy animation but it works) :P

[]:             Quote Post by Kadou » Sun Jul 02, 2006 12:56 am SSGokuJr wrote: Six Winged Angel wrote: i'm preparing a flash where a gundam faces eva-01 (crappy animation but it works) :P

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Jul 02, 2006 1:10 am no, I have the eva and the gundam at the right size, it's going to be something else.....XD

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Jul 02, 2006 5:52 am finished :P [url]http://www.freewebs.com/sixwingedangel/evabattle.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jul 02, 2006 7:33 am That rocked. I laughed for about a minute straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jul 02, 2006 9:14 am Six Winged Angel wrote: [url]http://www.freewebs.com/sixwingedangel/evabattle.html[/url]
